# Captured Antigravity payload fixtures

Empty until someone runs the capture procedure in docs/ANTIGRAVITY.md on a
machine with Antigravity installed. See ../README.md for the sanitization
rules and fixture format. Files here must use `"provenance": "captured-cli"`
or `"captured-ide"` and must never contain real prompts, file contents,
commands, personal paths, credentials, or session identifiers.
